page: Amazon Web Services m6idn.metal is a bare-metal, general-purpose server powered by dedicated Intel Xeon 8375C processors. It features 128 vCPUs across 64 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, operating at a clock speed of 3.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 512 GB of DDR4 memory running at 3 GHz, providing a balanced 4 GB of RAM per physical core.

For storage and networking, the server includes 7600 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 200 Gbps. This high-speed network and local storage configuration supports data-intensive operations without external storage bottlenecks.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier multi-core CPU performance, ranking in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core tests and Passmark CPU scores. Memory bandwidth for large uncached blocks is also in the top 10%, reaching 339.12 GB/sec. Single-core performance and text processing benchmarks fall into the average tier. The hardware profile offers high resource density and high-speed local storage, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring massive parallel processing and high-throughput networking.
This server is suited for large-scale databases, high-performance web serving, multi-threaded data processing, and enterprise applications that require direct access to physical hardware resources.
description: Amazon Web Services m6idn.metal is a bare-metal, general-purpose server configured with 128 vCPUs from dedicated Intel Xeon 8375C processors running at 3.5 GHz. It features 512 GB of DDR4 memory and 7600 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, alongside a baseline network bandwidth of 200 Gbps. Benchmark data highlights top-tier multi-core CPU performance and uncached memory read bandwidth, both placing in the top 10% of tested systems. Conversely, single-core CPU performance and text processing remain in the average tier. The combination of high-density physical cores, large local NVMe storage, and high-speed networking makes this server qualitatively cost-efficient for resource-intensive, parallel workloads. It is highly suited for large-scale database operations, high-throughput static web serving, and multi-threaded enterprise applications.

tagline: A high-capacity bare-metal platform featuring dedicated Intel processors, extensive local NVMe storage, and high-speed networking for parallel workloads.

512 GB of DDR4 memory and 7600 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
